title: Address Copilot review on PR #1189
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

PR: test(profile): regenerate seed profile (FF150-primed, uBlock) + assert extension startup
https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1189

## Unresolved Copilot review threads

- `openwpm/deploy_browsers/deploy_firefox.py:59` [outdated]

  `deploy_firefox` now always launches Firefox with `-remote-allow-system-access`, which enables privileged “system access” for the WebDriver session. Since OpenWPM is typically used to crawl untrusted content, this should be gated to test mode (or an explicit opt-in) unless it’s required for normal crawling.

- `test/test_profile.py:181` [outdated]

  This logs a normal test assertion value at ERROR level, which can pollute logs and trip fixtures that fail on ERROR log lines. Use DEBUG/INFO (or remove the log) since this isn’t an error condition.

- `scripts/regenerate-test-profile.py:98`

  `urlretrieve()` does not take a timeout here, so the XPI download can hang indefinitely on a slow/stalled connection. Since this script is intended to be reproducible, prefer an explicit `urlopen(..., timeout=...)` and stream the response to disk with a bounded timeout.

---

VERIFY each claim before acting — Copilot is fallible (it once flagged a valid os.getenv(key, default=...) as a bug). If real -> fix + resolve the thread. If wrong -> post a reasoned rebuttal + resolve. Builder -> the-hater -> done; never blindly apply.
